title: cyathocalyx ridleyi
intro: Cyathocalyx ridleyi, also known as the Ridley's cyathocalyx, is a species of plant in the family Olacaceae. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant's medicinal properties are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues. Cyathocalyx ridleyi is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
